step_rationale: Early AMI diagnosis biomarker; reflects myocardial injury and ischemic response.
mechanism: miR-19a is released during myocardial ischemia and necrosis, serving as an early circulating biomarker of acute MI.

references.title: Molecular miR-19a in Acute Myocardial Infarction: Novel Potential Indicators of Prognosis and Early Diagnosis.
references.journal: Asian Pacific journal of cancer prevention : APJCP

references.title: Circulating microRNA-19a as a potential novel biomarker for diagnosis of acute myocardial infarction.
